title: corallorhiza trifida var. integra
intro: Corallorhiza trifida var. integra is a rare and unique species of orchid, commonly known as the Yellow Fringed Coralroot. It is a terrestrial orchid that is native to North America, and is known for its unique ability to parasitize fungi in the soil, rather than photosynthesizing like most other plants. The medicinal properties of Corallorhiza trifida var. integra include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to offer health benefits such as reduced stress, improved digestion, and boosted immune system function.
